purpose: Set up new project focus area with customized sandbox, protocols, agents, and workflows

overview.description: Creates a new focus area (project sandbox) with structure tailored to project requirements
overview.trigger: User says 'create focus [name]' while in 8825 mode
overview.output: Fully configured focus area ready for use

phase_1_discovery.title: Project Discovery
phase_1_discovery.description: Understand project requirements and determine sandbox needs
questions_to_ask: What is the primary goal of this focus area?
What type of content will be processed? (files, web, APIs, etc.)
What workflows are needed? (ingestion, mining, generation, etc.)
What agents are required? (mining, dedup, decision, custom)
What protocols should be active? (existing or new)
What master files are needed? (libraries, configs, databases)

phase_2_design.title: Sandbox Design
phase_2_design.description: Design sandbox structure based on project requirements

design_decisions.exit_protocol: How to safely exit and validate

templates.joju_like: Full pipeline: ingest → mine → dedup → publish

phase_3_setup.title: Sandbox Setup
phase_3_setup.description: Create directory structure, files, and configurations
setup_steps: Create master files with initial structure

phase_4_validation.title: Setup Validation
validation_checks: Master files have valid JSON structure
Focus is registered in activation protocol

phase_5_activation.title: Focus Activation
phase_5_activation.description: Activate the new focus area for first use

activation_response.message:
✅ FOCUS CREATED: {Focus Name}

Sandbox: /{focus_name}_sandbox/
Protocol: /protocols/8825_{focus_name}_mode.json
Master File: {master_file_name}

Status: Ready for use

Available commands:
[List of focus-specific commands]

You are now in {Focus Name} mode. What would you like to do?

minimal_template.name: Minimal Focus
minimal_template.use_case: Simple data processing or file management

pipeline_template.name: Pipeline Focus (Joju-like)
pipeline_template.description: Full pipeline with ingestion, mining, deduplication, and publishing
pipeline_template.use_case: Complex data processing with quality control

generation_template.name: Generation Focus
generation_template.use_case: Creating content from data (reports, portfolios, documents)

research_template.name: Research Focus
research_template.use_case: Research projects, competitive analysis, market research

protocol_customization.description: Each focus can have custom protocols based on project needs

workflows.customize: Modify existing workflows for focus-specific needs

agents.configure: Adjust agent parameters for focus requirements
agents.create_custom: Define new agent recipes for specialized tasks

registration_process.description: Register new focus in system activation protocol
registration_steps: Include: name, description, sandbox_location, master_file, activation_command, protocols, version

system_questions: What is Forge's primary goal? → Project management and collaboration
What content types? → Tasks, projects, team data, timelines
What workflows? → Task ingestion, project tracking, team analytics, reporting
What agents? → Mining agent (extract tasks), decision agent (prioritization), promptgen agent (reports)
example_1_create_forge.result: Forge focus ready with task management workflows

customizations: Define workflow: collect → analyze → compare → synthesize → report
example_2_create_research.result: Market research focus ready with competitive analysis workflows

naming: Use lowercase with underscores (e.g., 'market_research', not 'Market Research')
structure: Start with template that matches use case
Keep master file structure simple initially
Document workflows clearly in protocol file
agents: Only create custom agents when necessary

validation_checks: Master file has valid JSON structure
Focus is registered in activation protocol
Exit protocol is defined with validation steps
error_handling: If directory creation fails: Report error, rollback changes
If JSON validation fails: Show errors, allow correction
If registration fails: Provide specific issue, guide user to fix
